item.title: Why data centers don't deserve so much hate
item.description: The hysteria around artificial intelligence and data centers is growing, but are the public's worst fears warranted? In this episode of "Make It Make Sense," James Hohmann, Jason Willick and Dominic Pino debunk the biggest myths about the technology's impacts on jobs and the environment.

item.title: America solved its dog problem. What about the cats?
item.description: Free-roaming felines kill 2 billion birds a year in America. That’s a policy failure.

item.title: In the disinformation war, the U.S. unilaterally disarmed
item.description: America is letting foreign disinformation run rampant.

item.title: A rise in assaults at school undermines claims about ‘restorative justice’
item.description: Students deserve stable, safe classrooms. Reducing suspensions is not the solution.

item.title: The FDA authorizes unauthorized nicotine products
item.description: Federal regulators are allowing sales of unapproved e-cigarettes and nicotine pouches.

item.title: Monumental debt
item.description: Michael Ramirez cartoon on the national debt and plans to build an arch.

item.title: Harvard’s solution won’t stop runaway A’s. This could.
item.description: Require transcripts to include the average grade for a given class.
